movie.actors: Wesley Snipes, Kris Kristofferson, Dominic Purcell, Jessica Biel
movie.plot: Blade, now a wanted man by the FBI, must join forces with the Nightstalkers to face his most challenging enemy yet: Dracula.
movie.title: Blade: Trinity
movie.writer: David S. Goyer, Marv Wolfman (character), Gene Colan (character)
